import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import API from "../../services/api"; import "./css/AdminDashboard.css"; // We created this beautiful CSS function AdminDashboard() { const [stats, setStats] = useState({ open_vacancies: 0, resumes_scanned: 0, top_matches: 0, alerts_sent: 0 }); const [liveCandidates, setLiveCandidates] = useState([]); // Fetch initial stats useEffect(() => { fetchStats(); }, []); const fetchStats = async () => { try { const res = await API.get("/admin/dashboard-stats"); setStats(res.data); } catch (error) { console.error("Error fetching stats:", error); } }; // Live candidates fetching can be simplified to a direct GET endpoint later if desired, // For now, it will remain empty until a job is posted (mocked state). // Helper for generating random avatars (like the animals in mockup) const getAvatarAndColor = (index) => { const options = [ { emoji: "🦊", color: "bg-orange-subtle" }, { emoji: "🐼", color: "bg-purple-subtle" }, { emoji: "🐨", color: "bg-gray-subtle" }, { emoji: "🦁", color: "bg-orange-subtle" } ]; return options[index % options.length]; }; return (
{/* Sidebar Navigation */}
📄
ResumeAlert 💡
🏠 Dashboard 📢 Post Job 📁 Job Vacancies 🔍 Resume Scans 📧 Email Logs ⚙️ Preferences
AUTOMATED SYSTEM
Auto-Matching
{/* Main Content Area */}
{/* Header */}

Smart Monitoring Dashboard 🤖 📊

Matching job criteria with user resumes in real-time. ✨

🔔 3
{/* Top Stat Cards */}
OPEN VACANCIES 📁
{stats.open_vacancies}
3 added today
RESUMES SCANNED 📄
{stats.resumes_scanned}
Real-time Sync
TOP MATCHES 🎯
{stats.top_matches}
High CGPA + Skills
ALERTS SENT 📧
{stats.alerts_sent}
Auto-triggered
{/* Smart Tips Box */}

Smart Tips 💡

The AI matches keywords in resumes and verifies CGPA before sending an alert. Accuracy is currently at 98%! 🎯

{/* Live Eligible Candidates Table */}

Live Eligible Candidates 🎓

Automatic matching based on vacancy criteria 🦄

{liveCandidates.length === 0 ? (
No matching candidates yet. Post a job to see real-time matches!
) : ( {liveCandidates.map((candidate, index) => { const uiTheme = getAvatarAndColor(index); const isHighMatch = candidate.match_score >= 80; return ( ) })}
CANDIDATE 👤 SKILL MATCH 🧩 CGPA 📚 ALERT STATUS 📧
{uiTheme.emoji}

{candidate.name}

Applied: React Dev
{candidate.match_score}% Match
{candidate.cgpa}
 {candidate.status === "Email Sent" ? (
EMAIL SENT ☑️
) : (
INELIGIBLE ❌
)}
)}
); } export default AdminDashboard;
